strengths: Extensive 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure domains
Proven AI-agent and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq, with direct relevance to AI strategy
Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries, demonstrating builder fluency
concerns: No explicit evidence of Master’s/PhD in AI-related field, missing preferred academic credential
Limited documentation of cloud platform architecture leadership (e.g., AWS/GCP/Azure strategic design)
German language proficiency is basic, potentially limiting direct strategic customer engagement in Germany
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with deep technical breadth across AI-agent systems, cloud infrastructure, and open-source product development, aligning strongly with the role’s need for builder fluency and strategic innovation. His startup-like initiative with GISCollective and contributions to AI tooling demonstrate the entrepreneurial spirit valued in this role. The lack of an advanced AI degree is a gap but not disqualifying given his hands-on AI product work.
